uiBuilder.label: D3 Choropleth Map
uiBuilder.description: A configurable geographic choropleth / symbol map rendered with D3.js (d3-geo). Bind a GeoJSON FeatureCollection of regions; each region is filled by a value via a sequential/diverging/quantized color scale (choropleth mode) or marked with a value-sized circle at its centroid (symbol mode). Selectable projection (Albers USA, Mercator, Equal Earth, Natural Earth, Orthographic), gradient color legend, optional region labels, hover highlight, and a fully restyleable property panel. Hook into click/hover events.

properties.name: data
properties.label: Data · GeoJSON
properties.description: A GeoJSON FeatureCollection: { type:'FeatureCollection', features:[ { type:'Feature', properties:{ name, id?, value? }, geometry:{...} } ] }. Each feature color/size comes from its joined numeric value (see Value field / the Values prop). Authors bind real GeoJSON (or a TopoJSON-derived FeatureCollection) to this property; leave empty to show built-in sample US-state data.

properties.name: values
properties.label: Data · Value join (optional)
properties.description: Optional array [ { id, value } ] (or { name, value }) that joins to features by id or name. When supplied it OVERRIDES the feature own value, so you can keep static geometry and feed live metrics separately. Leave empty to read the value from each feature properties.

properties.name: chartTitle
properties.label: Header & border · Title
properties.description: Title rendered above the map. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: titleFontSize
properties.label: Header & border · Title font size
properties.description: Font size of the chart title, in pixels.

properties.name: titleColor
properties.label: Header & border · Title color
properties.description: Text color of the chart title.

properties.name: componentWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Width
properties.description: Outer width of the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "50%", "640px". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: componentPadding
properties.label: Header & border · Padding
properties.description: Padding around the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "12px", "1rem". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.label: Header & border · Background color
properties.description: Map background. CSS color or "transparent".

properties.name: borderColor
properties.label: Header & border · Border color
properties.description: Border color of the widget. Leave blank for no border.

properties.name: borderWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Border width
properties.description: Border thickness in pixels. 0 = no border.

properties.name: borderRadius
properties.label: Header & border · Border radius
properties.description: Rounded corners of the widget, in pixels.

properties.name: chartHeight
properties.label: Display · Chart height (px)
properties.description: Height of the map in pixels (the main size knob; the projection is fit to the available width/height).

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.label: Display · Base font family
properties.description: CSS font-family for map text that does not have its own family set. Blank = inherit from the page.

properties.name: animate
properties.label: Display · Animate
properties.description: Fade regions (and symbols) in on first render and on data change.

properties.name: animationDuration
properties.label: Display · Animation duration (ms)
properties.description: Duration of the fade-in animation in milliseconds.

properties.name: animationEasing
properties.label: Display · Animation easing
properties.description: Easing curve for the fade-in animation.

properties.name: hoverHighlight
properties.label: Display · Hover highlight
properties.description: Emphasize a region on mouse-over (raise it and draw a darker outline).

properties.name: hoverDimOthers
properties.label: Display · Dim others on hover
properties.description: Fade the other regions (and symbols) while hovering one, to focus attention.

properties.name: projection
properties.label: Map · Projection
properties.description: Geographic projection used to draw the regions. Albers USA suits US-state maps (it composites Alaska/Hawaii and has no rotation). Mercator / Equal Earth / Natural Earth / Orthographic suit world or regional maps. The projection is auto-fit to your data extent.

properties.name: mapMode
properties.label: Map · Display mode
properties.description: Choropleth = fill each region by its value with the color scale. Symbol = fill regions a flat land color and draw a circle at each region centroid sized by value (a proportional-symbol map).

properties.name: valueField
properties.label: Map · Value field
properties.description: The property key on each feature that holds its numeric value when you are NOT supplying the separate Values join (e.g. "value", "count", "density").

properties.name: colorScaleType
properties.label: Colors · Scale type
properties.description: Sequential = a continuous low->high ramp. Diverging = a two-sided ramp around a midpoint (e.g. above/below a target). Quantize = discrete color buckets. (Choropleth mode.)

properties.name: colorScheme
properties.label: Colors · Color scheme
properties.description: The D3 color interpolator that maps value -> region color. Sequential schemes (Blues, Greens, Oranges, Reds, Purples, Viridis, Inferno, Magma, Cividis, YlOrRd, YlGnBu) suit one-directional data; diverging schemes (RdYlGn, RdBu, Spectral) suit a midpoint. (Choropleth mode.)

properties.name: reverseColors
properties.label: Colors · Reverse scheme
properties.description: Flip the color ramp so high values take the light end and low values the dark end (or vice-versa).

properties.name: colorMin
properties.label: Colors · Value domain minimum
properties.description: Fix the value that maps to the low end of the color scale. Blank = automatic (the data minimum).

properties.name: colorMax
properties.label: Colors · Value domain maximum
properties.description: Fix the value that maps to the high end of the color scale. Blank = automatic (the data maximum).

properties.name: divergingMidpoint
properties.label: Colors · Diverging midpoint
properties.description: Only for Diverging scale type: the value placed at the center of the color ramp. Blank = automatic (the mean of the data).

properties.name: quantizeSteps
properties.label: Colors · Quantize steps
properties.description: Only for Quantize scale type: the number of discrete color buckets the value range is split into.

properties.name: noDataColor
properties.label: Colors · No-data color
properties.description: Fill color for regions that have no joined numeric value (choropleth mode). Use "transparent" to leave them blank.

properties.name: landColor
properties.label: Regions · Land color (symbol mode)
properties.description: Flat base fill for all regions when Display mode = Symbol.

properties.name: borderStroke
properties.label: Regions · Border color
properties.description: Stroke color drawn between regions. Blank = no border.

properties.name: borderStrokeWidth
properties.label: Regions · Border width (px)
properties.description: Width of the region borders, in pixels. 0 = no border.

properties.name: symbolColor
properties.label: Symbols · Color (symbol mode)
properties.description: Fill color of the proportional-symbol circles.

properties.name: symbolOpacity
properties.label: Symbols · Opacity (symbol mode)
properties.description: Fill opacity of the symbol circles, 0-1 (helps when circles overlap).

properties.name: symbolMinRadius
properties.label: Symbols · Min radius (px)
properties.description: Radius (px) of the smallest-value symbol. Area encodes value via a square-root scale.

properties.name: symbolMaxRadius
properties.label: Symbols · Max radius (px)
properties.description: Radius (px) of the largest-value symbol.

properties.name: showLabels
properties.label: Labels · Show region names
properties.description: Draw each region name at its centroid. Labels on regions too small to fit text are skipped automatically.

properties.name: labelField
properties.label: Labels · Field
properties.description: Which feature property to use as the label text (default "name").

properties.name: labelFontSize
properties.label: Labels · Font size (px)
properties.description: Font size of the region labels, in pixels.

properties.name: labelColor
properties.label: Labels · Color
properties.description: Text color of the region labels.

properties.name: axisColor
properties.label: Axes · Line color
properties.description: Color of the color-legend axis line and tick marks.

properties.name: axisTextColor
properties.label: Axes · Text color
properties.description: Text color for the color-legend tick labels and titles.

properties.name: axisFontSize
properties.label: Axes · Font size
properties.description: Font size (px) for the color-legend tick labels.

properties.name: axisFontFamily
properties.label: Axes · Font family
properties.description: CSS font-family for the color-legend labels. Blank = use the base font family.

properties.name: showColorLegend
properties.label: Color legend · Show legend
properties.description: Show a gradient color legend mapping colors back to values (choropleth mode). In symbol mode this toggles a small size hint instead.

properties.name: colorLegendPosition
properties.label: Color legend · Position
properties.description: Where to place the color legend: to the Right of the map (vertical bar) or below it (horizontal bar).

properties.name: colorLegendTitle
properties.label: Color legend · Title
properties.description: Optional caption above/beside the color legend. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: colorLegendFormat
properties.label: Color legend · Tick format
properties.description: D3 number format specifier for the legend ticks and the {formattedValue} tooltip token (e.g. ".0f", ",.0f", "$,.0f", ".0%", ".2s"). Blank = default.

properties.name: showTooltip
properties.label: Tooltip · Show tooltip
properties.description: Show a hover tooltip over each region / symbol.

properties.name: tooltipTemplate
properties.label: Tooltip · Template
properties.description: Tooltip content (light HTML allowed). Tokens: {name}, {id}, {value}, {formattedValue}, {swatch} (a color dot matching the region/symbol), {color}, and any custom key on the feature properties. Interpolated values are HTML-escaped.

properties.name: tooltipFollowCursor
properties.label: Tooltip · Follow cursor
properties.description: Tooltip follows the pointer. Either way it is clamped within the chart bounds.

properties.name: tooltipBackground
properties.label: Tooltip · Background color
properties.description: Tooltip background (CSS color, supports rgba).

properties.name: tooltipTextColor
properties.label: Tooltip · Text color
properties.description: Tooltip text color.

properties.name: tooltipFontSize
properties.label: Tooltip · Font size
properties.description: Tooltip font size, in pixels.

actions.name: CHART_CLICKED
actions.label: Chart clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks anywhere on the map (not on a specific region).

actions.name: REGION_CLICKED
actions.label: Region clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks an individual region or symbol. Use to drill into details for that region.

payload.name: name
payload.label: Region name
payload.description: The name of the clicked region.

payload.name: id
payload.label: Region id
payload.description: The id of the clicked region (e.g. a 2-letter state code).

payload.name: value
payload.label: Value
payload.description: The numeric value of the region (null when no data).

actions.name: REGION_HOVERED
actions.label: Region hovered
actions.description: Fired when the user hovers a region or symbol. Useful for syncing external tooltips or details panels.

payload.name: name
payload.label: Region name
payload.description: The name of the hovered region.

payload.name: id
payload.label: Region id
payload.description: The id of the hovered region.

payload.name: value
payload.label: Value
payload.description: The numeric value of the region (null when no data).
